ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who uploaded the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was uploaded */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., selfie, landscape) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the image (e.g., uploaded, API) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client (e.g., retail, finance) */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the client company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_labels" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being labeled */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the image (e.g., happy, sad, angry) */,
  "label_type" TEXT /* Type of label (e.g., emotion, object) */,
  "label_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id", "label")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., CNN, transfer learning) */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to evaluate the model (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "evaluation_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Reference to the training data */,
  "training_labels" TEXT /* Reference to the training labels */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of the training process (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "training_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training process */,
  "training_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_emotions" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being analyzed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for analysis */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Recognized emotion */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recognition */,
  "emotion_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recognized emotion */,
  "emotion_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the recognized emotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_inputs" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text input */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who uploaded the text */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text input */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was uploaded */,
  "text_type" TEXT /* Type of text (e.g., review, feedback) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text (e.g., uploaded, API) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the text */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_inputs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being analyzed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for analysis */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Recognized sentiment */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recognition */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the recognized sentiment */,
  "sentiment_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the recognized sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id", "model_id")
)
